revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初十]][[zh:七月初十]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 10|qq=July 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhō|en|Kōhō|qid=Q1327182|lt=Kōhō|1=Kōhō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|964|en|964|qid=Q23951|lt=964|1=964}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}}) – Due to the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja|黄檗隠令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Ōwa|en|Ōwa|qid=Q1324768|lt=Ōwa|1=Ōwa}} to {{ill|Kōhō|en|Kōhō|qid=Q1327182|lt=Kōhō|1=Kōhō}}.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Eiji (era)|en|Eiji (era)|qid=Q1194167|lt=Eiji|1=Eiji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1141|en|1141|qid=Q19613|lt=1141|1=1141}} {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}}) – Due to the {{ill|Xinyou Revolution|lt=Xinyou Revolution|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|fr|Coq de métal|de|Metall-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|qid=Q1193929|lt=Hoen|1=Hōen}} to {{ill|Eiji (era)|en|Eiji (era)|qid=Q1194167|lt=Eiji|1=Eiji (era)}}. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1821|en|1821|qid=Q6976|lt=1821|1=1821}} {{ill|August 7|en|August 7|qid=Q2781|lt=August 7|1=August 7}}) – {{ill|Ino Tadataka|ja|井野忠隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ino Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began the survey work on the complete map of Japan, the “Dai-Nippon Enkai Yochi Zenzu”, and presented it to the bakufu. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}}) – The Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Japan and Britain was signed.
== Births == * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}}) – {{ill|Nakamura Fusetsu|en|Nakamura Fusetsu|qid=Q3335331|lt=Nakamura Fuhaku|1=Nakamura Fusetsu}}, an artist (painter and calligrapher) (died {{ill|1943|en|1943|qid=Q18623|lt=1943|1=1943}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|qid=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|696|en|696|qid=Q23486|lt=696|1=696}} {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}}) – {{ill|Prince Takechi|en|Prince Takechi|qid=Q837590|lt=Takaichi no Ōji|1=Prince Takechi}}, a son of Emperor Tenmu (born circa {{ill|654|en|654|qid=Q31109|lt=654|1=654}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1824|en|1824|qid=Q6994|lt=1824|1=1824}} {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}}) – {{ill|Maeda Narinaga|en|Maeda Narinaga|qid=Q6729104|lt=Maeda Saihiro|1=Maeda Narinaga}}, the 12th lord of the Kaga Domain (born {{ill|1782|en|1782|qid=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|9|7|11|6|10|8|7|0710|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 7월 10일]] [[ja:7月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:七月初十]]
[[ar:July 10 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月初十]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月初十]] {{wikidata link|Q839719}} [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 10 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
